overview: SketchLair is a professional digital painting web app with a full marketplace for purchasing learning modules and reference image packs. It features multi-document workflow, a GPU-accelerated painting engine, a Learn module system for figure drawing, and a Stripe-powered shop with permanent licenses and subscription access.
features: Figure drawing Learn module with reference images
Shop marketplace with Learning Modules and Reference Packs tabs
Permanent purchase licensing (pay once, own forever)
Admin portal for managing content and pricing
